payload.answer: I can offer repair options for this memory request, but I won’t commit it here.
citations: /brain remember Sam from Goldman mentioned that he likes Bill Evans.
repair_options: Add as a new separate memory: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.
Keep the memory tentative/attributed: Sam from Goldman reportedly mentioned liking Bill Evans.
If 'Sam from Goldman' may refer to multiple people, ask the user to disambiguate which Sam they mean.
If you want a cleaner structure, store this as two separate facts: Sam is from Goldman; Sam likes Bill Evans.
